description: Creates a semantic model from TMDL files with Direct Lake connection.
notes: Direct Lake models require TMDL format (model.bim cannot express mode:directLake). The --connection flag is the SQL Analytics Endpoint ID (not lakehouse ID). Creation is LRO. After creation, trigger a refresh: 'fabio semantic-model refresh --workspace $WS --id $ID'. For editable models, call 'fabio semantic-model takeover' to unlock portal editing.

query_examples.description: Semantic model ID (used for report binding, refresh, query).
